supported_devices: EC fans, AC fans, dimmable lights (0-10V/1-10V), CO2 sensors, negative pressure sensors, heating mat sensors, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters, irrigation pumps, heating mats, relays/contactors
port_types: RJ45 (EC fan, lights 0-10V, CO2 sensor, pressure sensor, heating mat sensor, sensors), Schuko outlet x4, DC 12-24V (MOSFET 1A), USB-B
compatible_sensors: GrowControl CarbSense (CO2), GrowControl PresSense (negative pressure), heating mat temperature sensor
compatible_co2_equipment: CO2 valves (time-calculated control via RJ45), CO2 generators (via Schuko socket)
recommended_use_note: Full-featured climate and CO2 controller for professional grow rooms; controls EC/AC fans, dimmable lights, CO2, multiple mains sockets for climate devices. Older model now superseded by GrowBase Pro.
uvp_notes: Original MSRP €849; at least one retailer (grow-bonn.de) sells as discounted older model at €600
notes: Older model explicitly labeled 'älteres Modell' (older model) by at least one retailer; superseded by GrowBase Pro. Amazon ASIN B01N91OHIV confirmed for EC Pro specifically. Schuko/Swiss T13 sockets. CO2 control supports time-calculated valve opening or optional CarbSense CO2 sensor. Display is multilingual (German/English). Socket 4 has inrush current limiter and 2-pole disconnect (2300W). Sockets 1-3 rated 1200VA each, 1600VA combined. DC output (MOSFET) 12-24V 1A for relays. 4 dehumidification modes. Settings retained after power loss. Made in Germany. Dimensions from retailer data; confirmed consistent across multiple sources.
